name: Heidi Heitkamp
subject: a snowball's chance
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm doing my best to help out my fellow Democrats on the ballot this year, and one of them is my good friend Tina Smith.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-heidi?refcode=em200214-heidi&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Hey there,

I'm Heidi, and I was proud to serve North Dakota as a Democrat in the United States Senate for six years. Now, I'm doing my best to help out my fellow Democrats on the ballot this year -- and one of them is my good friend, Tina Smith.

Tina has been standing up for hardworking Minnesota families every day she has been in the Senate. Now, she's running for re-election to continue fighting to maintain life-saving protections for folks with pre-existing conditions, end this trade war that has wreaked havoc on our farmers, and lower the cost of prescription drugs.

Republicans don't want to see any of that progress, which is why they're coming after Tina just like they came after me.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and all of their billionaire buddies know that defeating Tina would squander virtually any chance Democrats have of flipping the Senate and ending the GOP's stranglehold on the majority.

But without a groundswell of grassroots support, I'm afraid we won't have a snowball's chance of protecting Minnesota's Senate seat and flipping the Senate. That's why Tina was so eager for me to reach out to you.

**Look, I need your immediate help: Will you rush $10 or more right now -- every dollar you can before tomorrow's fundraising deadline -- to win in Minnesota and protect this Democratic Senate seat?** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-heidi?refcode=em200214-heidi&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-heidi?refcode=em200214-heidi&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")

| [$50 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-heidi?refcode=em200214-heidi&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=50")

| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-heidi?refcode=em200214-heidi&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")

| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-heidi?refcode=em200214-heidi&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")

| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-heidi?refcode=em200214-heidi&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")

The path to a Senate majority will not be an easy one -- but it's one we must take to move our country forward into a better future. Together, I know we can win.

With deep gratitude,

Heidi

name: Bill (2), me
subject: re: about last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRdrX1bu-OqYWJBVBdpjxTWs&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200214_frs&n=1) Friend — I wanted to make sure you saw my email from Wednesday. **New Hampshire was as clear a sign as any that our message is resonating with voters.** And now we need your help to capitalize on this momentum. Ieva tells me that if we want to compete on Super Tuesday, we need to raise another $150,000 by next Friday to make sure we have all the supplies we need. [**Can you help us reach that goal by chipping in $25, $50, or whatever you can to our Super Tuesday Victory Fund today?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRdrX1bu-OqYWJBVBdpjxTWs&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200214_frs&n=2) | | [SUPER TUESDAY

Thanks,
Bill

**From** : Bill Weld <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : February 12, 2020
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRdrX1bu-OqYWJBVBdpjxTWs&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200214_frs&n=4)
Friend —
Last night, over 13,000 New Hampshire voters went to the polls and voted against the incumbent president in his own party’s primary. _We did so well, in fact, that we got a higher percentage of votes in our primary than Vice President Joe Biden got in his._
**If that’s not a sign that our message is resonating with voters, then I don't know what is.**
Now, with Iowa and New Hampshire behind us, we’re onto the next phase of our campaign: Super Tuesday. There are a lot of delegates at stake, and if we play our cards right, we can continue to compete against President Trump through to the nomination. But to do that we need your help.
[**Can you help us keep the momentum going and become an inaugural donor of our Super Tuesday Victory Fund by chipping in $50, $100, or whatever you can today?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRdrX1bu-OqYWJBVBdpjxTWs&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200214_frs&n=5)
| [SUPER TUESDAY
VICTORY FUND →](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22OC9wr3F9c6eDdsSpUVSxsoT_oIu_qcqqQogxr3C8jRdrX1bu-OqYWJBVBdpjxTWs&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20200214_frs&n=6)
---
Onward,
Bill

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: Kansas Senate race TIED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

This is huge, Team:
**[The latest poll of the Kansas Senate race shows that Democrat Barbara Bollier is TIED with Republican Kris Kobach. Rush in a $5 donation now to help put Barbara over the top.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200108-barbara-bollier?refcode=em200214i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
As part of my Sprint to 2020, I'm doing everything I can to support Democrats in key races across the country who would be the champions for families we need in the Senate. That's why I wanted to share this exciting update right away -- at this incredibly pivotal moment, it's critical that we stand with Barbara Bollier and show the GOP that we're ready to turn Kansas blue.
Kansas has long been considered a part of the conservative stronghold -- so it is no surprise Republicans are gearing up to nominate a radical, anti-immigration ideologue who served under President Trump. But this latest poll is the clearest sign yet that the people of Kansas are ready for a change. That means Barbara can flip this seat -- with our help.
Team, I wouldn't ask if it weren't important. We need to show the GOP we're ready to fight and will stand with our Democratic Senate candidates to reclaim the Senate in November.
**[Will you make a $5 contribution now to help Barbara Bollier turn Kansas blue?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200108-barbara-bollier?refcode=em200214i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200108-barbara-bollier?refcode=em200214i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *
PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most critical tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can click here to let us know if you would like to [unsubscribe](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693285/22080b68/7be85808/46020098/3302526290/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "http://act.pattymurray.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join us today in fighting for progressive values and resisting Trump's agenda: [donate now](https://act.pattymurray.com/page/m/a693285/22080b68/7be85808/4602009f/3302526290/VEsD/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-emailfooter?recurring=yes").

With just 18 days left until the primary,**[this is still anyone 's race.](https://go.sarajacobsforca.com/page/m/164b79ed/27c6da69/2b38d969/12f0fab/1551429509/VEsE/?g=pdOgVDjfd5leRkt0m_fvHA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bp_q1-2020_sjc_donate?refcode=BLU-SJC-20200214-1-EM&amount=25&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250")

Great news:

On Wednesday, we announced our goal of $7 million before the Nevada caucuses.

And in the first 24 hours, tens of thousands of supporters stepped up to raise over $1 million toward our goal.

And now we've expanded our advertising budget in Nevada!

**We've started off strong, but we need to keep up the momentum. So we're sending everyone who makes their first contribution a FREE sticker to thank them for getting off the sidelines and being a part of this fight.**

And in the first 24 hours, tens of thousands of supporters stepped up to raise over $1 million toward our goal. And now we've expanded our advertising budget in Nevada! We've started off strong, but we need to keep up the momentum. name: Urgent@tinaforminnesota.com
subject: BREAKING: Donald Trump Jr. is raising money for our opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-jr?refcode=em200214-jr&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") We just got the news, folks:

**Donald Trump Jr. -- along with former Senator Norm Coleman -- is hosting a fundraiser for our opponent, Jason Lewis.**

Why is he so intent on meddling in our race? Because President Trump only lost the state by 1.5 points in 2016 -- which means he sees an opening.

Not only that, but _POLITICO_ is reporting that Trump's "campaign has made flipping Minnesota a top target this year."

That's why we're coming to you -- one of our top supporters -- for immediate help:

**Rush a donation of $10 or more to save Minnesota's Senate seat and protect our state from flipping red before our first mid-quarter deadline of the year >>** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-jr?refcode=em200214-jr&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-jr?refcode=em200214-jr&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")
---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-jr?refcode=em200214-jr&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
This fundraiser is only the beginning of what will likely be an onslaught of rallies to fire up Trump's right-wing base, attacks and smears backed by special interest cash, and millions more pouring in from GOP groups to try to buy this election.

We know that Trump and his allies will spend whatever they need to flip Minnesota red, which means we can't afford to take anything for granted. Not for a second.

Republicans see Minnesota as a potential pick-up opportunity to hold their Senate majority. So, we need to look as strong as possible and send a clear message that we are not backing down without a fight.

There's no room for error here. **[Please, donate anything you can before midnight.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200214-jr?refcode=em200214-jr&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10")**

Thanks!

-- Team Tina

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](). This grassroots movement has been fighting the President's greed, corruption, and political attacks on vulnerable communities for years -- and together, we've turned the tides towards justice and accountability.
But like all justice-driven movements, speaking truth to power comes with a price. We are being constantly and directly attacked by the President's defenders, and we have to prove the strength of our movement with our fundraising and at the ballot box this Election Day.
**[Team, tonight is our last mid-month deadline before the primary election -- Can I count on you to help make sure we head into this election with the resources we need to win?](https://act.myngp.com/el/LOLrZBQHeRM2_tWpdDSwYXbW2RU7MD7TFxToFTK1m0Y=/xkIksBR0ccKwURuunRAZrukRjKKB6_2Ui-AUJgTsOH0=?refcode=E1271-20200215-MidMonth-SL&amount=25)**

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15035096/158262508/-1907457918?refcode=02142020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNGFiOGE3Ny0wMjUwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1JxU15QEB7kNn7elr_P9Rg1VNZmdeTNLMdRJpV1gf50=)

Dear Friend, Endorsement season closed out yesterday, and I'm proud to announce that the Austin American-Statesman has endorsed my candidacy for United States Congress. The Statesman and the Chronicle are the only two major media outlets who issued endorsements. I thank all of you who helped me earn them both. I also want to thank you for your ongoing support during this final sprint into early voting and the primary. Your responses so far have enabled us to expand our billboard campaign in Waco to large format digital boards along I35, TX6, Valley Mills & Bosque and Franklin & New. If you're in Waco let me know if you see 'em! We're putting final touches on the radio ad and will start running it later this week. How broadly we can air it is almost entirely dependent on what can raise, not only in the next 48 hours but right up through the end of the month. Internal polling says we are running strong. Our phone banking and texting campaigns support that. But we are taking nothing for granted and we're going to run hard right up until the vote counts start coming in on election night. So yes, I'm asking all of us to dig deep and keep it up. name: R. Fortier
subject: Saturdays on the team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
For the last few weeks, we’ve done weekly Saturday canvassing shifts, and seeing how many people in this community believe in the work we’re doing and want to help us send Eugene to Congress means so much to me.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15038616/158292055/464986751?refcode=em_fr_2020.02.15_b1_rf_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNmM2N2IwYi0wZDUwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KFWlULs5hXWJsM_gJ9Kw0hK7a8mqNsnVlA-vxMI213Q=) Team,

There’s something special about Saturdays on this campaign. For the last few weeks, we’ve done weekly Saturday canvassing shifts, and seeing how many people in this community believe in the work we’re doing and want to help us send Eugene to Congress means so much to me.

**As I review our fundraising and field goals, I’m realizing that we’re still about $1,389 from where we need to be for where we are in the month. Team, if we don’t meet this goal, it could really hinder our ability to connect with voters.**

They’re stepping up to DEFEAT the swamp... don’t miss this! Tap or click >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/18298c44ed122d2f/6988cad91643fe4bc3d6b838967d376c/33013) Peter, Another poll is out this week. This time from the _Alabama Daily News_. This race remains neck and neck... but it shows establishment insider Jeff Sessions AHEAD by two points! With less than three weeks to go, we can’t let up. That’s why a group of top supporters has now EXTENDED their matching offer through the end of the month. [**Please respond today**.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/18298c44ed122d2f/c0eb04a3ea221562c3d6b838967d376c/33013) Make 2X the impact to help us close the gap and defeat the swamp! [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/18298c44ed122d2f/3e08c222c5b20becc3d6b838967d376c/33013) This is the question we want every Alabama conservative to ask themselves:

**Who do you really think will represent YOU in the U.S. Senate?**

We’ve had enough of failed career politicians who can’t get the job done. The status quo has been a DISASTER for Alabama and our great nation.

Coach is running for the same reason President Trump ran for our nation’s highest office. He’s not interested in a “career” in politics or being part of the D.C. club. He’s running to fight for our values and real change in our country.

It’s vital that we share this message far and wide across Alabama. Every dollar we raise will help us reach more voters and get them to the polls for Coach on March 3rd.

Follow one of the links below to make 2X the impact. **[Step up today to help us close strong and surge ahead to WIN!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/18298c44ed122d2f/b632e441d732e6e5c3d6b838967d376c/33013)**

subject: Let’s show Steve King the door
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

When I saw Steve King’s latest campaign finance filings earlier this month, I had to wonder: Is he even _trying_ to win this race?

I’m not shocked that his fundraising numbers have been low for months -- Iowans realize that his selfish, hateful agenda isn’t the way forward for our state. He isn’t getting things done for the people of this district, and that’s reflected in his fundraising numbers.

I’m proud that we, unlike our opponent, have the grassroots support of this community, and I want Steve King’s campaign to know it. **As we approach our February mid-month fundraising goal, we’ve got another chance to prove that we’re all in to win this race.**

**[Show Steve King what he’s up against by helping us meet our mid-month goal -- chip in any amount now>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15044222/158348593/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200215_midmonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJiOWE0ZS0yMzUwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UjVwRT2zEDFhNDCO86lP0rDlViUzInGoCi2FKATxuhc=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15044223/158348594/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200215_midmonth&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJiOWE0ZS0yMzUwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UjVwRT2zEDFhNDCO86lP0rDlViUzInGoCi2FKATxuhc=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15044224/158348595/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200215_midmonth&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJiOWE0ZS0yMzUwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UjVwRT2zEDFhNDCO86lP0rDlViUzInGoCi2FKATxuhc=)

[Express Donate $250](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15044227/158348598/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200215_midmonth&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJiOWE0ZS0yMzUwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UjVwRT2zEDFhNDCO86lP0rDlViUzInGoCi2FKATxuhc=) | [Donate Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15044228/158348599/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200215_midmonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJiOWE0ZS0yMzUwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UjVwRT2zEDFhNDCO86lP0rDlViUzInGoCi2FKATxuhc=)
I’m ready to fight for the people of this district in Congress. That means protecting small businesses, defending our farmers, and finding solutions to the problems facing our rural communities. **It _doesn’t_ mean pushing conspiracy theories or racism from within the halls of Congress.**

Our leaders should bring us together -- not divide us with hate and fear. That’s why I promise to be a representative who works for all the people of this district, not just those of a particular race, religion, political party, or background.

I believe that we can make Washington work for all of us. But not if people like Steve King are sent there to promote themselves while leaving the rest of us behind.

**[With your support, we can kick Steve King out of Congress. Chip in now so we can show him the door for good>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/15044229/158348600/-2077934265?refcode=em20_200215_midmonth&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZjJiOWE0ZS0yMzUwLWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UjVwRT2zEDFhNDCO86lP0rDlViUzInGoCi2FKATxuhc=)**

Standing Tall for All,

\-- J.D.

In just 7 days, Nevada will hold its caucuses for the 2020 Democratic nomination. In 14 days, South Carolina will hold its primary. And just 3 days after that, twelve states around the country will be voting on Super Tuesday.

Every dollar that we raise in the next 7 days goes right back out into critical advertising and organizing efforts in the Super Tuesday states, and building out more infrastructure for the long haul.

**That's why it's so important that we reach our goal of $7 million by the Nevada caucus. Anything you contribute would have a real, tangible impact in these final days -- and we need your help to make it happen.**

**[If you've been sitting on the sidelines, your support would have the most impact right now. >
This campaign was always built for the long haul. We have staff in over 30 states, volunteers knocking doors and organizing their communities in all 50 states, DC, and Puerto Rico, and an army of phone bankers and texters talking to voters everywhere about the issues that matter to them.

**With only 2% of the delegate share awarded so far, we're just getting started.** We have a plan to organize and win, but we need the resources to see it through -- and that's why we're relying on you.

Other candidates will probably hold fancy closed-door fundraisers with wealthy donors this week to raise money for the upcoming primaries. Not Elizabeth. We're doing this the right way: no PACs, no big bank executives, no closed door private fundraisers. Just grassroots donors, chipping in what they can.

Your support will send a powerful message to the ultra-wealthy trying to buy off our elections, to the naysayers who have counted us out, and to the corporate Wall Street interests trying to stop Elizabeth.

**[With your help, we can reach our goal, remain competitive through Super Tuesday, and finish building the groundwork to beat Donald Trump in November. Can you chip in $2 or anything you can right now?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852af6f/45c30650/1fe14db3f/66e53385/2259477273/VEsEDA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWZlYjIwZnItanVuZTIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTzcxRl9FR0xfR09MX1RfMjAyMDAyMTVfVjFTMV9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-feb20fr-june2?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMO71F_EGL_GOL_T_20200215_V1S1_P_T1")**

Thanks for everything you do,

Team Warren

name: Susan (iPhone)
subject: quick but important note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
'm directly reaching out because my February mid-month deadline is at midnight this evening. With every passing day, the dark money groups working to defeat me are getting stronger and spending more money in Maine. For the sake of Maine and our great country, we cannot let them defeat us in November.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDE3ODc3NjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTIyMzI1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_****_
Peter,
I'm directly reaching out because my February mid-month deadline is at **midnight** this evening. With every passing day, the dark money groups working to defeat me are getting stronger and spending more money in Maine. For the sake of Maine and our great country, we cannot let them defeat us in November.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE3ODc3NjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTIyMzI1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**My finance director Amy informed me that we are still $32,876 away from reaching our mid-month goal.**
That number might seem daunting, but if we work together I know we can reach it! But we only have until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.
[**Click HERE to contribute to my campaign today.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDE3ODc3NjES1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTIyMzI1OAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
We can do this with your help, Peter. I need you now more than ever!
All my best,
Susan

Friend,
Did you get Mondaire’s note yesterday? Since Friday morning, our supporters stepped up in a big way and **_we are now only $4,686 away from our February mid-month goal_**. Mondaire is out canvassing right now, connecting directly with voters, so we’re counting on this email to help us close that gap and reach our goal. **_[Will you chip in whatever you can to help us get there?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GwE/ni0YAA/t.2za/uaa6U2D1QbSjOfC0-mm8pQ/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJN51VlwlKzjifl0yMGCCSgQJf6BkOaxRwT7z08UDlXi-2BxLChdS5oZ3YdnxgRHIDYDODaWf6OAioIc02l313WUrcwnm3EOQ3eU7wLnf2aypsiqdEvOA6cTPdimu11ICUMz0lfItDkseHt67acsMH9NjJxZb5MrWliB643HzMIwXAvGJuxACicV1wBVz1gDNpE5DMkdPljfrf-2FMS0H23lofa/Lfq_)_** [Donate](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GwE/ni0YAA/t.2za/uaa6U2D1QbSjOfC0-mm8pQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJN51VlwlKzjifl0yMGCCSgBYCq4yV2YqtlfkGg3EbWTfVwIe3oWaIPz5fQZnGZJWlRUqKmD-2B-2BbfaRT9ax2vfLrS-2BZY06-2BJVOkA0NSRFxW7AaM1LgOd8Wzxdl-2FZ63xaN776Da-2BYEH0s7O81s0bD1OXBrjruH2yhSJA-2BrJoEts25-2BVzHMx-2BUI1LYU0UrWAe8lDQSo7BKJv1-2F3g6glwwTaHSN/4PtI)

\----- Subj: Coming up short From: Mondaire Jones
Friend, **** **** **** We have momentum. In the past two weeks alone, we were endorsed by Senator Elizabeth Warren, Representative Ayanna Pressley, New York Communities for Change, and the Hispanic Democrats of Westchester. I said from the beginning that we would run a campaign unlike anything voters in NY-17 have ever seen.
But our fundraising isn’t where we need it to be. _**We are $7,532 below where we need to be by this weekend**_ , and **_[we urgently need supporters like you to help us make up the difference.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GwE/ni0YAA/t.2za/uaa6U2D1QbSjOfC0-mm8pQ/h3/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIyWPMJRNwJ14LxkBS9UTfP4ehRlHsopbx-2FTfgSa10E2yf25zdr31Nwc1i0hCEH9lozkFSbK-2B1tEKGpz3lYr4NWw5t4sTfsnt241EuxYg-2FJhprIFkdlxT2jrAiULl10Vhy6fELbd9Qo4QX-2Bj3Galw3-2FvDWiaPO0lPvjPS1DyhcbOTopxbBvwV-2FvsOcjdckiJZeS4FyMLMLF1kxoWlM0OXbN/X-dR)_**

We don’t have that kind of money. But we have supporters like you. [**_Can you make a donation today to help us reach our goal?_**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/GwE/ni0YAA/t.2za/uaa6U2D1QbSjOfC0-mm8pQ/h5/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNIyWPMJRNwJ14LxkBS9UTfPEmZEi3wacGMk8tCzb2QeJyCy8I6xQCuC2NvhvH9J-2BBhwWAbyAh6MdGXYE85AcGBHWppsK3jthFlOZSMHs22QfonMUFB7lQ17J1h2udgV5JyOJQ43eKuKX0gHrIz9JBeYfbGdfr8x2dJAzjTmjnbRWj43IuBr9pO6xTS9uRQ4BXr4SpLUqHPMeNaWc-2B-2FhQVRF/EoJ_)

name: Election Security Update (via MarkWarnerVA.com)
subject: We need secure elections.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---
| | Are our elections secure against foreign infiltration?
Will Donald Trump continue seeking foreign assistance in his re-election campaign? [Take Mark's Election Security Survey >>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d607/53d9897e/5360b1fd/1c89b940/2272738556/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-electionsecurity") Derek,

This week Senate Republicans blocked Mark's commonsense election security bill from being voted on yet again. Mark's Foreign Influence Reporting in Elections (FIRE) Act is simple legislation: Instead of saying "thank you" when a foreign power offers you dirt on a political opponent, the FIRE Act would require presidential campaigns to report any contact from foreign powers to the FBI.

**Nothing will stop Donald Trump from continuing to seek foreign assistance for his re-election this year.**

The Senate essentially gave him their blessing to continue asking foreign leaders to help him get re-elected when they acquitted him in his impeachment trial. Some senators say they "think," or (even less optimistically) "hope" he understands his behavior was wrong. He doesn't. [Take Mark's Election Security Survey now >>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d607/53d9897e/5360b1fd/1c89b940/2272738556/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-electionsecurity") **Sure enough, Donald Trump continues to insist he 's done _nothing_ wrong.** This turn of events understandably makes many Americans even more concerned than they already were about the future of free and fair elections -- the cornerstone of our democracy.

Mark has been the strongest advocate for election security in Congress, introducing bills to protect the integrity of our elections from voter registration through to election night reporting. Unfortunately, these measures have been blocked by Republicans in the Senate. **[Will you take Mark's short election security survey so he can understand what you think about the future of our elections?](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d607/53d9897e/5360b1fd/1c89b940/2272738556/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/s/warner-electionsecurity")**

Thank you,

Warner Survey Team | ****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d607/53d9897e/5360b1fd/1c89b94f/2272738556/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ2NyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200215_s_1_fl__467__&refcode2=cont&amount=20")****
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d607/53d9897e/5360b1fd/1c89b94e/2272738556/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

| | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: Maria Elvira Salazar
subject: Do you support Free Speech?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Salazar for Congress |
body:
Because, I’m not so sure Donna Shalala does. | |
---
[ ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=6a6236aab5d249479497c51320a06dee&_e=oemtu8iXkSmof8vH7YShK-YUvAybyAVw_c0v_UNiVUBy4plIWvBfdgWVJrQuSNmzLZLXUh9TMQVxN2LY6MprgbD9BFAGjt_u1yOlLRDM1a9LfI6acBXPCG3-5Lapqu9zv1S9lXiujZxGjFaPdeVB-K5ONtSSsykPky5-aJLRRIaUck_TuOTTkb8s6n-oJu0l7lDcNe6FxZlHkvct5qBQltfMSiSY-Lp8zE4BYrWbEazRGF2IFwBx2-mPSNt-xHzG7ts6o6AHN4l4SNKDhcNAFPJdqOhRh-znuyNCI4nuFPYwKgyX61RthqKE6kHg4Ri403wkdjn4R-tRAR9AyeSCZfrfrUErtRNBB2J8e8GrsGc0AYFYR5fapcjxCI-ALD9WMcIRlBwkSkaUi5Sc48L0rnUfHAPxhfswT1ff9dDIfO3g36jyb96q-XXYZPt86UHO)
|
---
_Because, I’m not so sure Donna Shalala does._

According to the Washington Post, during her tenure as Chancellor of the University of Wisconsin-Madison, Donna Shalala was _**SILENT**_ when the University of Wisconsin Board of Regents enacted a “ _SPEECH CODE_ ”. The speech code attempted to control and _**INFRINGE**_ on the 1st Amendment rights of the students that attended the university. The speech code was found to be so egregiously unconstitutional that it was _**OVERTURNED**_ by a Federal Court!

**Unlike Shalala, I hold the freedom of speech very dear to my heart!**

I spent my career reporting on oppressive _socialist_ and _communist_ regimes in Latin America. I saw first hand that the people in these countries had no protections to freely speak their minds and were even _**JAILED**_ for their speech!

That’s why I need your feedback! **[I need to know how many people will STAND WITH ME to protect FREE SPEECH!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=6a6236aab5d249479497c51320a06dee&_e=oemtu8iXkSmof8vH7YShK-YUvAybyAVw_c0v_UNiVUBy4plIWvBfdgWVJrQuSNmzLZLXUh9TMQVxN2LY6MprgbD9BFAGjt_u1yOlLRDM1a9LfI6acBXPCG3-5Lapqu9zv1S9lXiujZxGjFaPdeVB-K5ONtSSsykPky5-aJLRRIaUck_TuOTTkb8s6n-oJu0l7lDcNe6FxZlHkvct5qBQltfMSiSY-Lp8zE4BYrWbEayCd9J34qjvuynm_bMc7lU3gL6VjlTj6olsqShmJUoX6OjZAc9CrbwOEFhFN_Ww_Tn2X-HUO1R1wyE4w5Jx3_GZjvSPOFs-OMB5eLd32gM5uzdxHW9hzQzfoLTPgrEUrtScTzvzgHIJEXJ4wgznjymS3g5QddxSr-jGWS7MNoY5p0eKoY44r_V9zOtH4So3KH2IWVy2zvDM3B1PyEaB9QI5)**
|
---
**DO YOU SUPPORT FREE SPEECH?**
[ **YES** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=6a6236aab5d249479497c51320a06dee&_e=oemtu8iXkSmof8vH7YShK-YUvAybyAVw_c0v_UNiVUBy4plIWvBfdgWVJrQuSNmz2IkyrIq9eZJOMwsRg4WS1QMjOwP3j8YDeMnaEiBzdl-XAtke-wwuAWS71ZHrhvLJvprusSFVs4tRjBvGwSoRVxHkXkJedWpkUQx1rhgnutyhHPkWTpraeUAO3J-YMgbG8gRYC022FvKjPhbVasvxcfA0esv19JJ-ZOGNgPI6_0TLjLrgkomjs6BZoTH219wpWwCDTuUPzox2W4E5M8ShDWu6ebWCZInMRIiz7hywX7wzDhEdfIfGbmqR35_XFR1_NdDS45SYEQBLV9zZmYMxK6wO0achxfw1LVl_trH41PcnRtho5smrtNOXsIZRzemkUis0KnZgznWlqob0sjxnLENTU1hG_O60DVJfe6HEn_QOfAEBzXzg46ouF4V5dN-V)
[ **NO** ](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=6a6236aab5d249479497c51320a06dee&_e=oemtu8iXkSmof8vH7YShK-YUvAybyAVw_c0v_UNiVUBy4plIWvBfdgWVJrQuSNmz2IkyrIq9eZJOMwsRg4WS1dnQ52QzZ0K5uRPfTWuNh-PAJjUH73HVp7hiVeMiltNX1mhGjCLu7fdyhyK3d2xin19dIeoP0xxIczggFiIhhAPqTOwWuW2VLMCCJPpzIZ0SJYY49nYruHvnwyOxKimLvpZrs-tOp1cQh9lq264ofqFoAwYjBhQFBoR3mQeJFkKFVp3_m79iC3Oz2eEx1uHk5MLUx8wyPnw2uOGTEKomFLJS8ycg3X0pXO0bXhZnUdBEmNjnOFp6vPmv85b9hWtuFNPAsQ4eXt_fBT4cb8DjTRwKzFYLiwnjCj8FNrd7blxWLbGxFKQLfIDDizD4fnfDiwkvjXo6ZxWuwyH2ZpvnL4UUKxdYMz9hCMbvLUirv5dC)
**Free Speech Poll Deadline: Midnight**

|
---
Peter, when the time comes for Donna Shalala to protect YOUR freedom of speech will she have your back or will she just STAY SILENT again? Her actions towards free speech point towards the latter. I promise to represent YOU, and never bow to the censorship of big liberal universities.

**[If you want your free speech protected then take my poll NOW!](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=a6858014873940e4ab6d0ae3b994ef92&_m=6a6236aab5d249479497c51320a06dee&_e=oemtu8iXkSmof8vH7YShK-YUvAybyAVw_c0v_UNiVUBy4plIWvBfdgWVJrQuSNmzLZLXUh9TMQVxN2LY6MprgbD9BFAGjt_u1yOlLRDM1a9LfI6acBXPCG3-5Lapqu9zv1S9lXiujZxGjFaPdeVB-K5ONtSSsykPky5-aJLRRIaUck_TuOTTkb8s6n-oJu0l7lDcNe6FxZlHkvct5qBQltfMSiSY-Lp8zE4BYrWbEawThRQiuUIWtaIz2CTp6MGfWpV5F4SRAPNvwgN5LaXlV36VQF43Y4xYWzebHYCXRcE0cnza7R_suzlsx0BaFcTFOQTVnTe4Pb6Jq0-Th_U4JucCKpOrv-D7ury5D7GncpgkIc1XBJV-Wk5drIBHj2G_zxkA-a0wXOIlqxwji4Arlq4zIvLR6kG6BtUXBKAk6gZ2i31nJ5cKeKiWTJF91E_l)**

Thank you,
Maria Elvira Salazar

name: Barack Obama Update
subject: Obama is asking for your support (2)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Governors Association
body:
Team, we wish we didn't have to reach out again, but right now we still need to raise $8,313 before our critical mid-month deadline, and we're getting really worried about closing the gap.
---
President Obama is calling on grassroots supporters to do whatever it takes to elect Democrats in key swing states this year. But with the GOP pouring MILLIONS into defeating us, we will LOSE if we don't fight back right now.
Team - we need you to answer Obama's call and take advantage of this critical match opportunity before midnight, and it looks like you still haven't given yet. **[So please, will you stand with President Obama RIGHT NOW and donate $1 or more? Every dollar will be DOUBLED to stop Republicans, elect Democrats across the country and DEFEAT TRUMP!](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MTY5NjI2NzkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDkwNjQyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Obama Update** <info@dga.net>
Date: Sat, Feb 15, 2020
Subject: Obama's asking you
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
| | |
---
We were starting to lose hope, Team.

Republicans were spending MILLIONS to attack Democrats and advance the Trump agenda, **but Democrats weren 't donating to help us fight back. **

But then President Obama asked you to make a commitment to electing Democrats... and donations went THROUGH THE ROOF!
[](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTY5NjI2NzkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDkwNjQyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
There are critical governors' races coming up this year, and we have the historic opportunity to win in key swing states across the country. But with the GOP massively outspending us, Democrats will lose if we don't act RIGHT NOW. **Team, we need you to answer Obama 's call and donate to elect Democrats in 2020.******
**
We pulled your supporter record, and here 's what we found:**
**Name:** Top Supporter
**Supporter ID:** 8751682
**Given to stop Trump today?** **NO**
Hitting every single fundraising goal is the _ONLY_ way we can beat Trump and his GOP allies - but right now, we're falling way short of our $25,000 mid-month goal, and we're running out of time.**Luckily, a group of donors is MATCHING every gift 2X to help us raise another $11,475 before midnight tomorrow. **
**[Team, we need you to stand with Obama and donate $1 or more right now. Every dollar will be DOUBLED to elect Democrats up and down the ballot, defeat Republicans and STOP Trump:](http://links.dga.mkt6018.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MTY5NjI2NzkS1&r=NDgzNzk3NjA4NzczS0&b=0&j=MTgyMDkwNjQyMAS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

name: Texas Battleground HQ
subject: How does Sen. Cornyn compare?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
This race is about integrity, service, and Texas values like strength and independence.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905bd/7f51f7bc/4d3ec39e/4ef1b835/158976175/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | **BREAKING:
_Austin American-Statesman_ endorses MJ in the primary!** Hi Peter,

We want to tell you why replacing Sen. Cornyn with MJ Hegar in November **matters so much.** But if you already know the reasons and are ready to pitch in to support MJ's campaign, **[you can do that here.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905bd/7f51f7bc/4d3ec39e/4ef1b82b/158976175/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200215.1nd__907__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**This race is about**integrity, service, and Texas values like strength and independence.**

MJ has dedicated her entire life to service.**
* A combat search and rescue pilot in the Air Force, she went head to head with the Taliban in Afghanistan.
* Then, she took on the Pentagon to overturn the Ground Combat Exclusion Rule that barred women from ground combat jobs.
* **Now, she's the only political outsider in Texas' Senate race.** She's a working mom who has actually faced the struggles many Texans do, and she's not accepting a dime from corporate PACs. **[That means she needs you -- will you donate today to send MJ to the Senate?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905bd/7f51f7bc/4d3ec39e/4ef1b82b/158976175/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200215.1nd__907__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

**Sen. Cornyn, on the other hand?**
* **First** , he worked his way up in the political establishment in Texas.
* **Then** , he spent nearly two decades in Washington selling Texans out to the special interests and his DC bosses -- like when he voted to repeal health care protections _eighteen times._
* **Now** , he's running for reelection with an over $12 million war chest heavily funded by special interests, **with outside groups _already_ boosting him and spending millions on ads.**

**The choice couldn't be clearer:** a working mom and combat veteran who has lived her values or an entrenched establishment politician who takes his marching orders from the special interests and DC bosses like Mitch McConnell. **Are you with MJ?** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---

**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905bd/7f51f7bc/4d3ec39e/4ef1b82d/158976175/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200215.1nd__907__&amount=25")**
**[Express donate $50>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905bd/7f51f7bc/4d3ec39e/4ef1b822/158976175/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200215.1nd__907__&amount=50")**

\-- Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905bd/7f51f7bc/4d3ec39e/4ef1b82b/158976175/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwNyJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200215.1nd__907__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: You know you love a top ten
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://us20.campaign-archive.com/?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=c8567bb686&e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| Hi friend,

In just THREE DAYS, **your vote gets to be your voice for preserving conservative values in our great state and our great country**.

In case you need motivation to take advantage of the opportunity to vote early, I’ve come up with a top ten list for you.

Hope you’re ready for a chuckle!

## TOP TEN REASONS TO VOTE EARLY

10\. Vote early to send me to Congress to help President Trump pass his entire agenda.

9\. Vote early to keep Beto from taking your guns.

8\. Vote early to make sure Bernie doesn’t try to redistribute your vote.

7\. Vote early to keep Schiff from inventing a whistleblower.

6\. Vote early to celebrate President Trump’s impeachment acquittal.

5\. Vote early so Nancy Pelosi doesn’t get your ballot and rip it in half.

4\. Vote early to stick it to the Democrats.

3\. Vote early to get the border wall built sooner.

2\. Vote early to help save more babies from abortion.

**1\. Vote early because you are an American patriot!**

**Early voting starts ON TUESDAY! **
---
| |
---
| [Yes! I will vote early!](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=44317090df&e=01c99b7fbd "Yes! I will vote early!")
---
| [**If you vote during early, you can vote at any one of the voting locations listed here on my website.**](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=beba0c8cb8&e=01c99b7fbd)

Post on your social media and let your friends and family know you’re voting early to #KeepAmericaGreat and send me to Washington D.C.!

---
| [Yes! I will vote early!](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=166555fd63&e=01c99b7fbd "Yes! I will vote early!")
---
| I’ll be working the polls every day during early voting, from February 18 through February 28.

Will I see you at the polls?!

God bless America. God bless Texas. God bless you.

Kathaleen Wall

---
| [Contribute](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=8f4bcbd6cb&e=01c99b7fbd "Contribute")
---

Kathaleen Wall for CongressP.O. Box 1429Sugar Land, TX 77487
[Add us to your address book](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/vcard?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877)
You can [update your preferences](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/profile?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=ec24f70877&e=01c99b7fbd&c=c8567bb686).

body:
How well do you know Governor Eric Holcomb? You probably know how much he loves Indiana and serving Hoosiers, but there’s a lot about the Governor | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=47a435a556e349efbf8283527eed2514&_e=VVGOuszcbeb7fX8_SppHGd046q_3_yH9e-sKrAVdajMb7TJUh9x_VNX1JHIPRROI5W9otD2dYzgeOPrQoWg6wjPxwsGI4oOj5EN18AKxPFN1dV0xTl30BeN7q8TZcOtJKmVR35yp7PtcP0VxESHxVtTL9XI62zV57CcvjkTG3hoCY2prJLgajtd5vzCOCmwg793dj_8KByX1arS6p_y3nq24b3BPEbvviAYJq00ccwXh3ILcEEKwTNU6JN_Im5_dq6rK3FnCMyLaqBsPRgJckOM61Hf1r2jV7ANZZqfuLcd_M4XYNIXirm7wEbM6fw_47QeJgf8DzDdzKaAM7paqEzd7M24k75JlbqIiDarRxRa1SPt4KSwIdQ5bVM4Epth7jGqij477I5JbNvjm2XHwU7QKDyzk270SZrTOCDvEl6w%3D) |

Friend,

How well do you know Governor Eric Holcomb?

_You probably know how much he loves Indiana and serving Hoosiers, but there’s a lot about the Governor that might surprise you. _

**Take our quiz below and see if you know these fun facts about Indiana’s 51st governor. **

name: Progressive Majority
subject: Nearly 1/3 of Democrats polled might STAY HOME on Election Day in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Progressive Majority PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter \-- The day after Trump's acquittal, he took to national television to defend his "perfect call" with Ukraine and attacked Adam Schiff, calling him a "vicious, horrible person." He declared the impeachment "evil," calling it "corrupt" and full of "dirty cops," "leakers and liars." Now he is retaliating against national security official Lt. Col. Vindman for his testimony during the impeachment trial and driving out career DOJ attorneys in order to grant favors to Roger Stone \-- corrupting the DOJ into serving as an arm of his re-election campaign. But according to a recent Emerson poll, 13% of Democrats say they won't vote against Trump if their top Democratic candidate doesn't win the primary. And another 15% say it depends on who becomes the nominee. If nearly a third of Democrats stay HOME in November, Trump will be re-elected without a check on his presidency. name: Team Hick
subject: Just $4
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks, we're asking if you'll chip in just $4 today. Wanna know why? **Democrats only need to flip four seats to take back the Senate majority this year. Our best chance is right here in Colorado.** Our opponent, Cory Gardner, is the most vulnerable Republican Senator on the books. His approval ratings are underwater because time and again he proves his loyalty to Trump and McConnell over everyday Coloradans. It's clear Colorado is up for grabs -- that's why Washington Republicans and dark money groups are dumping cash into our state to attack John and try to save Gardner. **We can 't let them get away with it.** **Will you chip in $4 before our mid-quarter deadline at midnight to help us flip one of the four seats Democrats need to take back the Senate? name: Team Kennedy
subject: Become a citizen co-sponsor of Joe's Voices for Environmental Justice Act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903d8/55b66746/22e98cf2/80fe030/1311859824/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | Climate change is the fight of our lives. We have to move quickly. Deliberately. And we need to bring everyone into the fight. **For too long, communities that have been most affected by climate change, pollution and environmental degradation have been left out of the conversation about solutions - black and brown communities, immigrant communities, indigenous communities, working-class communities.** That's why Joe introduced the Voices for _Environmental Justice Act_ in the House this week. It will:
* Empower frontline communities with legal protection when toxic facilities are being built in their communities.
* Create a federal grant program for low-income communities and communities of color to hire independent experts to participate in the environmental decisions affecting that community's health and safety.
* Demand transparency and accountability for corporations when starting projects in frontline communities.

**Every family deserves clean air and clean water. Every community deserves basic health and safety. And every one of us deserves a planet that will be there for our kids and grandkids.** **This bill will help ensure the people most at risk are at the table when decisions about their future - our future - are being made.[ Sign your name now to become an original citizen co-sponsor of Joe's Voices for Environmental Justice Act:](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903d8/55b66746/22e98cf2/80fe031/1311859824/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/environmental-justice/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-02-environmental-justice-email")** [BECOME AN ORIGINAL CITIZEN CO-SPONSOR](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903d8/55b66746/22e98cf2/80fe031/1311859824/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/environmental-justice/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-02-environmental-justice-email") We need environmental and climate justice. And we need it now. For our planet -- and our people. Team Kennedy [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/363903d8/55b66746/22e98cf2/80fe031/1311859824/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.kennedyforma.com/petition/environmental-justice/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2020-02-environmental-justice-email") |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Why does Kendra Horn want your taxes to go up?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANET BARRESI FOR CONGRESS
body:
If she didn't she'd support making the tax cuts permanent. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/68c26068aceb/calling-all-patriots-12049109?e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=148aaddbf0&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | [KEEP TAXES LOW](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=6315d9d19c&e=795c6d9796 "KEEP TAXES LOW")
---
| Peter, Kendra Horn ran as a so-called moderate, someone interested in helping the middle-class succeed.

Then why isn't she supporting making President Trump's middle-class tax-cuts permanent?

Because of Democrat obstructionism, the only way Congress could pass the tax cuts was to make them expire in ten years, but Democrats refuse to hold a vote to make them permanent.

It shows just how radical the Democratic Party is. They want to use regular folks' tax dollars to fund their big government priorities, all while taking power away from communities and states. It's shameful.

When elected to Congress I will support making every single tax cut permanent. We all know Washington has enough money, it just spends too much of it.

[**Will you join our campaign to make these middle-class tax cuts permanent and send a conservative to Washington? Donating just $5, $15, $25, $50, or even $100 makes a big difference and will be key to beating Kendra Horn's leftist millions.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5d044f140a&e=795c6d9796)

Remember, this is no ordinary house race. Oklahoma's 5th district has been called the most competitive house race IN THE COUNTRY by National Journal and others.

We need to make sure we elect a strong conservative to run against Kendra Horn or we won't stand a chance against the big money machine gearing up to keep her Pelosi rubber-stamps like her in office.

[**Please consider donating just $5, $15, $25, $50, or even $100 to help fight back against one of Pelosi's top allies in Congress. Thank you.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=d89f5da724&e=795c6d9796) Best,

clean_body: If she didn't she'd support making the tax cuts permanent. | | | | | | | "KEEP TAXES LOW" | Peter, Kendra Horn ran as a so-called moderate, someone interested in helping the middle-class succeed. Then why isn't she supporting making President Trump's middle-class tax-cuts permanent? Because of Democrat obstructionism, the only way Congress could pass the tax cuts was to make them expire in ten years, but Democrats refuse to hold a vote to make them permanent. It shows just how radical the Democratic Party is. They want to use regular folks' tax dollars to fund their big government priorities, all while taking power away from communities and states. It's shameful. When elected to Congress I will support making every single tax cut permanent. We all know Washington has enough money, it just spends too much of it. Remember, this is no ordinary house race. Oklahoma's 5th district has been called the most competitive house race IN THE COUNTRY by National Journal and others. We need to make sure we elect a strong conservative to run against Kendra Horn or we won't stand a chance against the big money machine gearing up to keep her Pelosi rubber-stamps like her in office. Best, \--Janet Barresi | "DONATE NOW" | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 Janet for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200215-48hours?refcode=em200215-48hours&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") I don't have a lot of time, folks, but I wanted to write a quick little note.

Our very first mid-quarter fundraising deadline of 2020 ends at midnight. This will be our first real test of this all-important election year. The numbers we report at the end of this quarter -- and the amount of people who give -- will say a lot about the strength of our grassroots movement.

It's critical we report strong numbers every single quarter from here on out to prove that Democrats have the momentum to take on the GOP and win back the Senate -- starting right here in Minnesota.

**We're still a little behind on our goal, so I'm asking: Will you pitch in anything you can to help us reach our first mid-quarter fundraising deadline of 2020? I’m deeply disappointed by the inability of the Republican-controlled Senate to be a check on our President’s corrupt actions, especially by their lea | | | [](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=f360babba4b541f7889d2eb849cc73a3&_e=_IZbZ5qSTeQrH4koFyZnZ-6Sy4WuoeWpWFabl33B2hHPWdAo283UZwQGTQbc5qZpBXK8m7fTDa6vRdF_Imyoa9q6sTqL5bkqICYoj3PM443WqKuOp_KV44qrt3-uTLgbJU0V3z-UaGjtAPe2iY5BxHgGMRD4-FbLv_qdV84C0xV0JpZzL2npzreoni77928jmB0VDiScTztxw86DLYS5o_3ntsx7LUq1h27VGj0SVLStNGxCb9VA6kjfMqxhlJb7Iar4kzddYoSulTPcBI7pDlF5trLVafR_HIC_Ohrj54zIr8ybnSqH33i_R0u61DiEpuHqKxXhMMoXOksDC90M2ktdbCkivv2NjG3p97B-urv8DWLqAYBWJ_DUFZcvG7LM8SF9CDRpSjTagZ-z4Pv6lpfs0IM8D5DHDS5H9aBZeFxJB7kCf6DXwdC1hb1WolB_XW5ZAQYhFgqDuBCQa0Ar2TSQtAHwSS7JSYxQnNgXe1g%3D) Friends, I’m deeply disappointed by the inability of the Republican-controlled Senate to be a check on our President’s corrupt actions, especially by their leader Mitch McConnell and his #1 yes-man Steve Daines. **[If you’re also disappointed and frustrated with our Senate, donate $20 or even just $3 today to help me flip Montana blue.](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=9d604abc9de24d9a90a97f1ff916f905&_m=f360babba4b541f7889d2eb849cc73a3&_e=_IZbZ5qSTeQrH4koFyZnZ-6Sy4WuoeWpWFabl33B2hHPWdAo283UZwQGTQbc5qZpBXK8m7fTDa6vRdF_Imyoa9q6sTqL5bkqICYoj3PM443WqKuOp_KV44qrt3-uTLgbJU0V3z-UaGjtAPe2iY5BxHgGMRD4-FbLv_qdV84C0xV0JpZzL2npzreoni77928jmB0VDiScTztxw86DLYS5o_3ntsx7LUq1h27VGj0SVLStNGxCb9VA6kjfMqxhlJb7Iar4kzddYoSulTPcBI7pDhxKtKuFxuNKSp6s8B71NzUc1Z1uS4ljBp8okL7WRqLGAbwTfo1Onhu0DbXMS6u5nGhYNHV26PMj4o1zHfyEEHQ4iYz49VWGQgg_8jAKaf0PHHFLUacwWScV6hg5sjzcC4sSJ-D9NovxUQTHE-qjZ3rke1MPbIghWnsCQImrYBQt9oo_OGvTf9zEWfrbCRBG_SrNP1iSc_CVJr6C_V1TCFA%3D)** As a U.S. military veteran, all the political grandstanding and inaction deeply hurt me and the service I did for this country. clean_body: I’m deeply disappointed by the inability of the Republican-controlled Senate to be a check on our President’s corrupt actions, especially by their lea | | | Friends, I’m deeply disappointed by the inability of the Republican-controlled Senate to be a check on our President’s corrupt actions, especially by their leader Mitch McConnell and his #1 yes-man Steve Daines. As a U.S. military veteran, all the political grandstanding and inaction deeply hurt me and the service I did for this country. I served our democracy in the military, and in just a few short weeks, the Senate may have done irreversible damage to it by covering up the crimes of President Trump. # Jake's b-day is tomorrow! Will you sign his card?
Today is a busy day. We're out knocking doors and making calls, but we wanted to make sure you got a chance to sign Jake's[ b-day card](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=03ecb357e1&e=1050d051da). Jake is a great guy and he's going to be a great Congressman, so we want to make sure he has a great surprise on his b-day!

For Jake's 32nd b-day we're asking supporters to [sign his card](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=d1f4156879&e=1050d051da) and [to give $32 to his campaign. Any chance you can help us out?](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=917e42e870&e=1050d051da)

_**P.S. we've attached a few pics below of hard-working students helping get Jake elected! **_

name: MJ Hegar Senior Staff
subject: We've got to be ready, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905a0/7f51f7bc/4d3310c6/4ef1b86b/895689499/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905a0/7f51f7bc/4d3310c6/4ef1b868/895689499/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200215.2nd__909__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
We'll be blunt, Peter:

We're reaching out because **[MJ needs your help to compete with Senator Cornyn and WIN in November](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905a0/7f51f7bc/4d3310c6/4ef1b868/895689499/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200215.2nd__909__&amount=10&recurring=true")**. November may seem far away, but give us just a minute, and we'll explain why pitching in _now_ is so important.

Senator Cornyn has already aired the first TV ads of the race, thanks to the **$12 million war chest** he amassed with the help of corporate PACs and special interest donors. This race is already picking up, and it's clear it's going to be a long and expensive one. **We 've got to be ready to fight back.**

But here's the deal: Unlike Senator Cornyn, MJ doesn't have any corporate PACs boosting her campaign. She's relying on grassroots support because she plans to be **accountable to Texans, not the special interests**.

And that means **[MJ can't win this race without you](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/648905a0/7f51f7bc/4d3310c6/4ef1b868/895689499/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkwOSJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200215.2nd__909__&amount=10&recurring=true")**. As we get closer to the election, folks will look to the amount of money we've raised to measure how good of a chance we stand to defeat Senator Cornyn next November.

**We know this team has what it takes. Now will you pitch in to help us prove we can defeat John Cornyn and win this race?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

body:
Bumping the e-mail that Susan sent this morning! She asked us to make sure all of her supporters see it.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDE3ODc2ODUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTIyMzAzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_****_
Peter,
Bumping the e-mail that Susan sent this morning! She asked us to make sure all of her supporters see it.
There are only hours left before Susan's February mid-month deadline and she is still short of her fundraising goals. The deadline is almost here but we STILL HAVE TIME.
[**Chip in anything you can before midnight!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDE3ODc2ODUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTIyMzAzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
This is it, Peter. We can make a difference in this campaign. [**Show your support and help Susan put Maine and our country above partisan politics!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDE3ODc2ODUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTIyMzAzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
-Team Collins

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Susan (iPhone)
Date: Saturday, February 15, 2020
Subject: quick but important note
To: < dpwillis67@gmail.com >

Peter,
I'm directly reaching out because my February mid-month deadline is at **midnight** this evening. With every passing day, the dark money groups working to defeat me are getting stronger and spending more money in Maine. For the sake of Maine and our great country, we cannot let them defeat us in November.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDE3ODc2ODUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTIyMzAzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**My finance director Amy informed me that we are still $32,876 away from reaching our mid-month goal.**
That number might seem daunting, but if we work together I know we can reach it! But we only have until MIDNIGHT TONIGHT.
[**Click HERE to contribute to my campaign today.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE3ODc2ODUS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTcwMTIyMzAzNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
We can do this with your help, Peter. I need you now more than ever!
All my best,
Susan

body:

| | I'm reaching out one last time. **I 'm reaching out one last time before our crucial mid-quarter deadline.** Our election is just 31 days away and I want to make sure we can come out on top. See, my Republican opponent has issued Donald Trump a permission slip to do whatever he wants -- **and he 's completely disregarded our Constitution in the process.** I might be old fashioned, but I believe our Constitution and democracy should come before party -- **and our elected leaders should always revere and protect them.** [**We 're just $791 short of our mid-quarter goal -- and if we want to take Chabot down, we can't fall behind. Will you chip in before midnight?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_feb?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200215_MQ5_U2_X1&amount=25&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+Wersquore+just+791+short+of+our+midquart&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200215_MQ5_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200215_MQ5_U2_X1") Thank you for your support, Nikki

body:
| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em200215-bad?refcode=em200215-bad&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Ugh, bad news...

Donald Trump is coming after Minnesota. Why? Because as Tina has said many times before, it's a swing state -- and he sees an opening.

Trump and his allies are spending millions of dollars to try to win here, which means we can't take anything for granted in this race, especially when it comes to fundraising.

At midnight tonight, we will officially mark the halfway point in the quarter -- and the way things are currently looking, we could fall behind on our fundraising goal.

clean_body: | "" Ugh, bad news... Donald Trump is coming after Minnesota. Why? Because as Tina has said many times before, it's a swing state -- and he sees an opening. Trump and his allies are spending millions of dollars to try to win here, which means we can't take anything for granted in this race, especially when it comes to fundraising. At midnight tonight, we will officially mark the halfway point in the quarter -- and the way things are currently looking, we could fall behind on our fundraising goal. Rush a donation of $10 or more to save Minnesota's Senate seat and protect our state from flipping red before midnight >> If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "=" This is our last chance to bump up our fundraising numbers before we close the books on our first mid-quarter deadline of this critical election year. We're so close to hitting our goal (so close!) and your donation just might be the one that puts us over the edge. "" Thanks! -- Team Tina

The brutal truth: corporate control of our government is undermining our safety. As long as our politicians stay nestled in the pockets of the NRA and gun lobbyists, the common-sense gun reforms we need just won't get passed. Behind every roadblock on the path to progress is someone making money off of human suffering. **Watch how Tom plans to take on the gun industry and enact the necessary laws to keep us safe: **
